title: group_members CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS after migration v2 is misleading dead code
description: store.rs lines 320-329: a bare CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS group_members without FK constraints appears after migration v2 which already creates group_members with ON DELETE CASCADE constraints. The IF NOT EXISTS makes this a no-op on every real path, but it reads as the authoritative schema definition when it is not. A contributor editing this block believes they are changing schema when the migration v2 block is the real definition. Fix: remove the post-migration group_members block, leave a comment pointing to migration v2.
